zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Beaumont於大約1386年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter26歲，母親Katherine de Everingham20歲。他於1413年與Philippa Maureward在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1457年在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Beaumont于大约1386年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter26岁，母亲Katherine de Everingham20岁。他于1413年与Philippa Maureward在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1457年在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Beaumont was born about 1386, in England, his father, Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter, was 26 and his mother, Katherine de Everingham, was 20. He married Philippa Maureward in 1413, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1457, in Amberg-Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Beaumont est né environ 1386, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katherine d’Everingham, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Maureward en 1413, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1457, à Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Beaumont um 1386 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter 26 und seine Mutter Katherine de Everingham 20. Er hat 1413 in Leicestershire, England Philippa Maureward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1457 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Beaumont è nato il circa 1386 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Everingham, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Maureward nel 1413, nel Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1457, nel Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Beaumontが約1386年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garterは26歳，母Katherine de Everinghamは20歳であった。1413年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでPhilippa Maurewardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1457年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンバーグ-スルズバチで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Beaumont(이)가 대략 1386년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Everingham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1413년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Philippa Maureward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1457년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Everingham, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Maureward em 1413, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1457, em Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemanha, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Beaumont родился около 1386 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Everingham, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Maureward в 1413 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1457 г. в местности ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1386, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Katherine de Everingham, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Philippa Maureward en 1413, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1457, en Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 72 años.
